observe: Draw the arrows. Every process points to whatever it's waiting on. If a trail ever loops back, we're already trapped.
fault: Four arrows. The last one points right back to where we started. There's your cycle.
repair: Trace it all the way around. Confirm it closes.
escape: Confirm the cycle now — it won't hold still much longer.

observe: A wait-for graph shows which processes are waiting on which resources.
fault: The wait-for graph contains a cycle.
repair: Trace the graph to confirm the circular wait.
escape: Confirm the detected cycle before time expires.

hints: Start at any process and follow the arrows — a cycle means you return to your start.
